title: XAT 2026 Answer Key OUT xatonline.in Direct Download Link Here

detail.title: XAT 2026 Answer Key OUT xatonline.in Direct Download Link Here
detail.short_info: XAT 2026 Answer Key has been released. Candidates can download the answer key, check responses, and follow the steps to raise objections at xatonline.in.

sections.heading: XAT 2026 Answer Key OUT xatonline.in Direct Download Link Here

content.text: XAT Provisional Answer Key 2026: The Xavier School of Management has released the provisional answer key for the Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT). Candidates can download their provisional answer key from the official website xatonline.in.
XAT Xavier Aptitude Test Provisional Answer Key 2026 Released @ xatonline.in

Latest Update: The Xavier School of Management (XLRI) has officially released the Xavier Aptitude Test Provisional Answer Key 2026 for XAT. Registered candidates can now download their provisional answer key from the official portal xatonline.in. The provisional answer key contains essential details including question-wise correct options, allowing candidates to estimate scores and raise objections if needed. The objection window is open along with the release.
Download - XAT Provisional Answer Key 2026

sections.heading: XAT Provisional Answer Key 2026 - Quick Overview
How to Download XAT Provisional Answer Key 2026?

content.text: Open your web browser and go to the official website: xatonline.in

sections.heading: Step 2: Find Provisional Answer Key Link

content.text: On the homepage, look for the link that says "XAT 2026 Provisional Answer Key" or "Download Answer Key" or "Answer Key Objection". This is usually in the "Latest Announcements" or "Candidate Login" section.
You will need to provide:
Click on the "Download Provisional Answer Key" or "Submit" button. Your provisional answer key will appear on the screen (in PDF format). Carefully verify all details including:

items: Your marked responses (if linked with response sheet)

content.text: Save the provisional answer key as a PDF file on your device and take 2-3 printouts. Keep them safely for reference and objection raising.

Important: Download your provisional answer key as soon as it's released to avoid last-minute technical issues or server overload. Use it to calculate tentative scores and raise objections if necessary.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on XAT Provisional Answer Key 2026

items: Candidate's response (if combined with response sheet)

content.text: Exam Day Guidelines
Before Leaving for Exam:

items: Check exam center location on Google Maps
Plan to reach 30-45 minutes before reporting time
Keep admit card and ID proof in a clear folder

content.text: At the Examination Center:

items: Follow all instructions given by the invigilators
No use of mobile phones or electronic devices
Do not communicate with other candidates
Raise your hand if you need any assistance

content.text: Prohibited Items in Exam Hall:
